samples.title: Cassette close-up
samples.scenario: large foreground object, soft background lights
samples.notes: Good for disocclusion checks around hands and transparent cassette edges.

samples.title: Keyboard hands
samples.scenario: multi-depth mid-shot with fingers, keyboard, monitors
samples.notes: Useful for layer split and mask edge tests with multiple near surfaces.

samples.title: Hover Politsia street
samples.scenario: wide scene with separate foreground actors and deep background
samples.notes: Good for background plate and overscan planning.

samples.title: Drone portrait
samples.scenario: portrait with strong subject isolation and bokeh
samples.notes: Good for foreground/background separation and safe camera travel presets.

samples.title: Punk rooftop
samples.scenario: single seated figure on rooftop with deep urban background
samples.notes: Good for foreground human grouping against a complex wide city backdrop.

samples.title: Truck driver
samples.scenario: subject inside a vehicle cabin framed by window geometry
samples.notes: Good for testing object grouping inside hard frame boundaries.
